description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a collared shirt, necktie, and tailored trousers. The shirt is long-sleeved and tucked into the pants, which are straight-legged and paired with formal shoes. The figure's arms are extended outward in a neutral pose, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The head is proportionate, with short, neatly styled hair and subtle facial features. The overall build is average, with a naturalistic human form and realistic body proportions. The clothing and shoes are smooth and unadorned, suitable for an urban or professional environment.
description: A formally dressed adult male figure in business attire, with a collared shirt, tie, trousers, and formal shoes, standing in a neutral pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, necktie, and full facial features with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fit of the shirt and trousers, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and trousers, with arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with necktie and tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
